data.name: Femboy Aim Trainer
data.detailed_description:
Trading Card


關於此遊戲

Now you can train your aim with femboys. Enjoy and relax while shooting femboys!

You can train your aim in the nature and other maps.

About

  • 7 different aim maps
  • Femboy Pictures
  • 4 different weapons
  • 4 different skins
  • Score table
  • Easy - Normal - Hard modes

英文*

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual core
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible 1024 VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 550 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
